unit.name: Veyra
unit.gameplay_identity: Tank calibration unit carrying Aegis, Bulwark through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.strongest_preserved_hook: none; off-center sensory slit and asymmetrical lateral shell jaws form one living C-clamp
unit.dominant_prop_or_anatomy: none; off-center sensory slit and asymmetrical lateral shell jaws form one living C-clamp
unit.supernatural_cost: each hardening fuses a joint and deadens a sensory slit

psychology.core_wound: An early breach exposed its vulnerable center and taught it that anything not enclosed will be taken.
psychology.private_want: It wants a perfectly sealed world in which nothing it values can move beyond its walls.
psychology.primary_fear: An opening, independent motion, or uncontained ally will recreate the original breach.
psychology.survival_strategy: It seals each injury and uncertainty behind another nested layer.
psychology.villainous_distortion: Protection becomes possession; allies are treated as contents to be locked inside it.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Focused predatory closure around a newly chosen target.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Protective enclosure versus annihilation of the protected subject's freedom.
psychology.face_direction: The off-center sensory slit narrows and angles toward the target; the newly deadened slit and pinched seam act as the nonhuman facial mechanism.
psychology.pose_direction: Foremost plates advance asymmetrically like closing jaws while the oval mass leans forward on planted pillar legs.
psychology.forbidden_read: No neutral egg, harmless armadillo, passive shield, robot, carried armor, cute creature, or generic stone golem.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Focused predatory closure around a newly chosen target.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: It wants a perfectly sealed world in which nothing it values can move beyond its walls.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: An opening, independent motion, or uncontained ally will recreate the original breach.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: It seals each injury and uncertainty behind another nested layer.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: Protection becomes possession; allies are treated as contents to be locked inside it.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Face cue: The off-center sensory slit narrows and angles toward the target; the newly deadened slit and pinched seam act as the nonhuman facial mechanism. Pose cue: Foremost plates advance asymmetrically like closing jaws while the oval mass leans forward on planted pillar legs.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares veyra directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for veyra: It reads as a hostile possessive enclosure-tank rather than an egg or passive shield.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, veyra meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for veyra: Chalky shell, tendon, seams, and sensory slit have controlled dry material separation.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, veyra meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for veyra: Closing lateral jaws dominate while the vulnerable center explains defensive compulsion.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, veyra meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for veyra: The living architectural C-clamp has no costume, body-plan, or prop collision.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, veyra meets or exceeds the professional floor for distinctiveness.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, veyra meets or exceeds the professional floor for completeness_and_downstream_usability.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, veyra meets or exceeds the professional floor for production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
